notes: KNOWN FAILING — irrlicht's codex adapter does not detect <turn_aborted> markers, so the working→ready transition after ESC never fires. events.jsonl shows ready→working at first activity, then ~30s of silence until process_exited. The transcript itself clearly logs <turn_aborted> and the second prompt's normal response, so the daemon-side parser is the missing piece. Re-record and clear the known_failing flag once the codex parser handles turn_aborted.

text: First user prompt (long essay) drives ready → working
Spec: ESC interrupt cancels the in-flight turn — state returns to ready when codex emits <turn_aborted>
Spec: second user prompt drives ready → working on the same session
Spec: second turn completes; state returns to ready
